channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senator Blackburn Revives Birth Tourism Ban Legislation
item.description: Senator Marsha Blackburn reintroduced a bill to prohibit using childbirth as a reason for obtaining a temporary U.S. visa.

item.title: House Republicans Seek to Use Democratic Infighting as Midterm Advantage
item.description: Mike Lawler warns of radical socialist influence in the Democratic Party as GOP aims to retain swing seats in suburban New York.

item.title: Rand Paul Says Mitch McConnell Plans to Return to Senate, Countering Conspiracy Theories
AIPAC Removes Donation Links for Democrats
item.description: AIPAC removed donation buttons for Democrats who supported cutting aid to Israel from its campaign website.
